title: Subtitle Mod
body:
![title1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6440fb6ce6b878be11420c6de00594d4861ad79a.png)
_Requires [Common Network](https://modrinth.com/mod/common-network) & [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) in mod and [CommandAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/commandapi) in plugin._

This mod consists of a system, through a **command**, that generates a **subtitle** with a **transparent background** for all players for a set time.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccb14202293f39c9091399bbf1d07687080be7e7.png)

It's also **configurable** in the **client** to give your **subtitles** a more **customizable look**, allowing you to change _paddings_, _text scale_, _border spacing_, and _background color_.

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb504aebf7ebdd0d0e5649eafb114f05d736d89_0.webp)

![title2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833cb3f6e6877870ffb6e1e4735bcc7324acc024.png)
- /subtitle <players> <seconds> <message> | You can use ; for line separation and & for color-coding in the message.

_**NOTE:** If you **send** a subtitle while another one is in **progress**, it will **overlap**, changing the message and time._

![title3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c2e17ae0a951d3aeaa76cf4251fb6cdca7bf0d.png)
If you have any problem or suggestion you can report it in the community discord (Spanish-speaking) by opening a ticket: https://discord.gg/sKRYYyVCnw

If you want to support us you can do so through:
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/BannedStudios
- Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/soykatto
